name: SAFETY INSURANCE GROUP INC
summary: Safety Insurance Group is a leading Massachusetts-based provider of private passenger automobile, commercial automobile, and homeowners insurance, operating exclusively in Massachusetts, New Hampshire, and Maine through four insurance subsidiaries. The company sells exclusively through independent agents and offers additional products including dwelling fire, umbrella, business owner policies, inland marine, and watercraft coverage. In 2025, total direct written premiums reached approximately $1.28 billion.
